Title: The Pirates: The Last Royal Treasure
Actors: Kang Ha-neul, Han Hyo-joo, Lee Kwang-soo
Plot: The Pirates: The Last Royal Treasure is a 2022 South Korean period adventure film directed by Kim Jeong-hoon and starring Kang Ha-neul and Han Hyo-joo. A spiritual sequel of 2014 film The Pirates, the film is about adventures of pirates who gather in the sea and search for the royal treasures that have disappeared without a trace.
